  • Reference
    • Example 1: Two arm | Fixed design | Continuous
    • Example 2: Two arm | Interim | Continuous | t-test
    • Example 3: Two arm | Fixed design | Two correlated continuous endpoints | t-test
    • Example 4: Two arm | Fixed design | Correlated continuous & time-to-event endpoints | t-test + survival analysis
    • Example 5: Multi-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Dunnett test + MCP-Mod
    • Example 6: Two-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Overall + exploratory subgroup analysis
    • Example 7: Two-arm | Fixed design | Single continuous endpoint | Bayesian Go/No-Go with placebo borrowing
    • Example 8: Seamless Ph2a/2b | Two-arm -> Multi-arm | Single continuous endpoint | Bayesian Go/No-Go + Bayesian MCP-Mod
    • Example Multi Run: Two arm | Interim | Continuous | t-test
    • Example usecase
    • Getting Started

Generate Trial Enrollment and Dropout Plan

gen_plan.Rd

Creates a time-indexed plan of enrollment and dropout events across arms.

Usage

gen_plan(sample_size, arms, allocation, enrollment, dropout)

Arguments

sample_size

integer Trial sample size.

arms

character vector of arm identifiers.

allocation

numeric vector of allocation ratios.

enrollment

function generating inter-enrollment times (PDF).

dropout

function generating inter-dropout times (PDF).

Value

data.frame with columns: time, arm, enroller, dropper.

See also

gen_timepoints() for piecewise-constant rates, add_timepoints() to attach generated plans to a Timer.

Examples

gen_plan(
  sample_size = 100,
  arms = c("A", "B"),
  allocation = c(2,1),
  enrollment = function(n) rexp(n, rate = 0.5),
  dropout = function(n) rexp(n, rate = 0.1)
)
#>             time arm enroller dropper
#> 1      0.7712136   A        1       0
#> 2      1.3332409   A        1       0
#> 3      2.0874765   A        1       0
#> 4      2.4640446   A        1       0
#> 5      4.1636169   B        1       0
#> 6      7.2900240   A        1       0
#> 7      8.2475448   B        1       0
#> 8      9.4294145   B        1       0
#> 9      9.7907821   A        0       1
#> 10    13.0245403   A        0       1
#> 11    17.5114379   A        1       0
#> 12    19.1977374   A        1       0
#> 13    21.1294798   B        1       0
#> 14    24.1000314   B        1       0
#> 15    26.2293159   B        0       1
#> 16    26.7961203   A        1       0
#> 17    29.1331783   A        1       0
#> 18    29.4139224   A        0       1
#> 19    32.3448830   B        1       0
#> 20    35.3383687   A        1       0
#> 21    38.4796738   A        1       0
#> 22    38.5432093   B        1       0
#> 23    39.7389087   A        1       0
#> 24    44.0745882   A        1       0
#> 25    45.0878196   B        1       0
#> 26    45.4645953   A        0       1

#> 30    53.2587710   A        1       0
#> 31    54.8401345   B        1       0

#> 36    62.8846556   B        1       0
